donation_funds.name: Youth Scholarship Fund
donation_funds.description: Provides need-based tuition assistance so that no young singer is turned away due to financial hardship.

donation_funds.name: General Operations Fund
donation_funds.description: Supports the choir’s greatest needs, including music purchases, staff, and program development.

donation_funds.name: Touring Ensemble Fund
donation_funds.description: Helps cover travel, lodging, and outreach costs for our touring choirs.

locations.name: Main Campus
locations.notes: Primary rehearsal and audition location with multiple choir rooms and a small performance hall.

locations.name: Downtown Center
locations.notes: Easily accessible by public transit; hosts community workshops and adult programs.

locations.name: North Side Arts Annex
locations.notes: Satellite location used for select rehearsals and outreach concerts.

locations.name: Eastside Community Church
locations.notes: Partner venue for holiday concerts and large combined-choir rehearsals.

newsletter_frequency_options.label: Daily Updates
newsletter_frequency_options.description: Receive an email whenever there is news, usually a few times per week.

newsletter_frequency_options.label: Weekly Roundup
newsletter_frequency_options.description: A summary of upcoming concerts, auditions, and news every week.

newsletter_frequency_options.label: Monthly Newsletter
newsletter_frequency_options.description: Once-a-month email with highlights, stories, and key dates.

newsletter_frequency_options.label: Monthly Digest
newsletter_frequency_options.description: Condensed version of our monthly newsletter with just the essentials.

newsletter_interest_options.label: Upcoming Concerts
newsletter_interest_options.description: Performance announcements, ticket offers, and program details.

newsletter_interest_options.label: Scholarships & Financial Aid
newsletter_interest_options.description: Deadlines, application tips, and updates about tuition assistance.

newsletter_interest_options.label: Volunteer Opportunities
newsletter_interest_options.description: Ushering, front-of-house roles, and other ways to get involved.

newsletter_interest_options.label: Organization News
newsletter_interest_options.description: Season announcements, leadership updates, and impact stories.

newsletter_interest_options.label: Community Workshops
newsletter_interest_options.description: Free and low-cost community singing and education programs.

scholarship_types.name: Need-based Tuition Scholarship
scholarship_types.description: Provides tuition assistance based on demonstrated financial need for singers enrolled in any youth ensemble.

scholarship_types.name: Merit-based Scholarship
scholarship_types.description: Awards partial or full tuition based on audition results, dedication, and leadership.

scholarship_types.name: Other Support & Fee Waivers
scholarship_types.description: Covers other program fees such as tour participation or uniform costs on a case-by-case basis.

ensembles.name: Prelude Choir
ensembles.description: An introductory ensemble for young singers focusing on pitch matching, basic rhythm, and the joy of group singing.

ensembles.name: Training Chorus
ensembles.description: Builds foundational music literacy, part-singing, and healthy vocal production for developing singers.

ensembles.name: Lyric Treble Choir
ensembles.description: For intermediate treble voices ready for more challenging repertoire and performances.

ensembles.name: Cantabile Middle School Choir
ensembles.description: A mixed ensemble for changing and unchanged voices, emphasizing healthy technique and expressive singing.

ensembles.name: Bella Voce Girls Ensemble
ensembles.description: An advanced ensemble for treble voices focusing on diverse repertoire and leadership opportunities.

ensembles.name: Cambiata Boys Chorus
ensembles.description: Supports changing voices with a focus on range, confidence, and camaraderie during the voice change.

ensembles.name: Concert Chorale
ensembles.description: A flagship ensemble for experienced singers performing major works and appearing in subscription concerts.

ensembles.name: Chamber Singers
ensembles.description: Select small ensemble for advanced high school singers with strong music-reading skills.

ensembles.name: Touring Ensemble
ensembles.description: Advanced touring choir representing the organization at regional and international festivals.

ensembles.name: Downtown Treble Choir
ensembles.description: A convenient option for families in the city center, focusing on ensemble skills and music literacy.

ensembles.name: North Side Youth Choir
ensembles.description: Neighborhood-based ensemble serving singers on the north side with a full-season performance schedule.

ensembles.name: Community Teen Choir
ensembles.description: A non-auditioned ensemble for teens who love to sing and want a lower-pressure choir experience.

events.title: December Holiday Concert
events.subtitle: Songs of Light and Hope
events.description: A festive evening featuring all advanced ensembles in a program of carols and winter selections.

events.title: Family Carol Sing
events.subtitle: An Interactive Holiday Sing-Along
events.description: Bring the whole family to sing favorite carols with our youth choirs and band.

events.title: Spring Gala Concert
events.subtitle: Voices in Bloom
events.description: A formal concert featuring Cantabile Middle School Choir, Concert Chorale, and Chamber Singers.

events.title: Youth Spring Showcase
events.subtitle: Featuring Prelude, Training, and Lyric Treble Choirs
events.description: A family-friendly afternoon concert highlighting the progress of our younger ensembles.

events.title: Fall Welcome Concert
events.subtitle: Opening the 2025–2026 Season
events.description: Kick off the season with performances from all choirs and a community sing-along finale.

events.title: Chamber Music Benefit for Scholarships
events.subtitle: An Evening in Support of the Youth Scholarship Fund
events.description: Faculty and guest artists perform to raise funds for need-based tuition assistance.

events.title: Community Sing-Along
events.subtitle: Open Rehearsal with the Community Teen Choir
events.description: A relaxed community event where everyone is invited to sing easy favorites side-by-side with our teens.

events.title: Adult Community Singing Workshop
events.subtitle: Finding Your Voice
events.description: A free workshop for adults of all experience levels focusing on healthy vocal technique and ensemble singing.

events.title: Adult Community Singing Workshop
events.subtitle: Singing in Harmony
events.description: Explore singing in two- and three-part harmony in this free, downtown evening workshop for adults.

events.title: Youth Leadership Retreat
events.subtitle: Developing Leaders in Song
events.description: A full-day retreat for selected singers focusing on leadership skills, team-building, and musicianship.

events.title: Donor Appreciation Reception
events.subtitle: Celebrating Our Supporters
events.description: An intimate gathering with performances and stories highlighting the impact of donor generosity.

events.title: Tour Send-Off Concert
events.subtitle: Featuring the Touring Ensemble
events.description: Hear the full tour program before the choir departs for its summer festival tour.

events.title: Winter Youth Concert
events.subtitle: Songs of Wonder
events.description: Mid-season concert featuring all training and intermediate choirs.

events.title: Neighborhood Park Concert
events.subtitle: Choirs in the Park
events.description: An outdoor performance featuring select ensembles in a relaxed, family-friendly setting.

ticket_price_tiers.name: Balcony
ticket_price_tiers.description: Balcony seating with a full view of the stage.

ticket_price_tiers.name: Child / Youth
ticket_price_tiers.description: Discounted ticket for ages 18 and under.

ticket_price_tiers.name: Family Pack
ticket_price_tiers.description: Family pack valid for up to 4 attendees.

ticket_price_tiers.name: Patron Circle
ticket_price_tiers.description: Premium seating with a post-concert reception.

ticket_price_tiers.name: General Admission
ticket_price_tiers.description: Open seating, first come first served.

ticket_price_tiers.name: Supporter
ticket_price_tiers.description: Includes a small additional donation to support the choirs.

ticket_price_tiers.name: Benefit Ticket
ticket_price_tiers.description: Includes concert admission and a reception; proceeds support scholarships.

ticket_price_tiers.name: Benefactor Ticket
ticket_price_tiers.description: Premium seating and recognition in the program.

ticket_price_tiers.name: Tour Supporter
ticket_price_tiers.description: Includes a $25 tax-deductible contribution to the Touring Ensemble Fund.

ticket_price_tiers.name: Youth / Senior
ticket_price_tiers.description: Discounted ticket for youth and seniors.

ticket_price_tiers.name: Free Lawn Seating
ticket_price_tiers.description: Bring your own blanket or chair; open lawn seating. Event was later cancelled.

audition_slots.description: Placement audition for Prelude Choir and Training Chorus.
Auditions for Lyric Treble Choir and similar intermediate ensembles.
Placement for Cantabile Middle School Choir and Community Teen Choir at the Downtown Center.
Weekend audition block for singers interested in North Side Youth Choir and similar groups.
After-school auditions for Training Chorus and Lyric Treble Choir.
Weekday evening auditions at Main Campus for Lyric Treble Choir and similar intermediate ensembles.
Weekday evening auditions at Main Campus for Cantabile Middle School Choir.
Additional evening auditions for youth choirs at Main Campus.
Saturday morning auditions for Prelude Choir candidates.
Evening auditions at the Downtown Center for Downtown Treble Choir.
Placement for North Side Youth Choir and related ensembles.
After-school auditions for singers considering Lyric Treble Choir.
Early May evening auditions for late applicants to youth choirs.
Auditions at Eastside Community Church for Bella Voce and Concert Chorale.
Mid-season auditions for openings in Lyric Treble Choir.
Auditions for Community Teen Choir at the Downtown Center.

workshops.title: Adult Community Singing Workshop: Finding Your Voice
workshops.description: A welcoming, no-experience-required workshop for adults focusing on healthy vocal production, breathing, and singing with others.

workshops.title: Adult Community Singing Workshop: Singing in Harmony
workshops.description: Explore two- and three-part harmony in an encouraging setting geared toward adult beginners and returning singers.

workshops.title: Adult Vocal Skills Lab
workshops.description: A free follow-up workshop for adults focusing on range, tone, and ear training.

workshops.title: Community Sing: Folk Songs for Adults
workshops.description: Sing favorite folk and Americana songs in an adult-only circle at the Main Campus.

workshops.title: Summer Adult Choir Intensive
workshops.description: A paid, multi-session workshop for adults interested in choral singing fundamentals.

workshops.title: Youth Sight-Reading Bootcamp
workshops.description: A skills workshop for singers ages 1014 to build sight-reading confidence.

workshops.title: Downtown Youth Vocal warm-ups
workshops.description: Fun, free vocal warm-up session for youth singers ages 812.

workshops.title: Family Community Sing
workshops.description: All ages welcome for an evening of easy rounds, canons, and songs from around the world.

workshops.title: Songs in the Park
workshops.description: An outdoor, all-ages sing-along in Oak Park Amphitheater.

workshops.title: Adult Community Singing Workshop: Jazz Standards
workshops.description: Learn to sing classic jazz standards in a relaxed adult workshop. This session was later cancelled due to weather.

workshops.title: Middle School Leadership Through Music
workshops.description: Workshop for youth singers to build leadership skills through musical games and activities.

workshops.title: Holiday Family Sing-Along Workshop
workshops.description: A festive, family-friendly workshop of carols and holiday favorites at the Downtown Center.

volunteer_opportunities.title: Spring Gala Concert Usher
volunteer_opportunities.description: Assist guests with seating, hand out programs, and provide friendly front-of-house support for the Spring Gala Concert.

volunteer_opportunities.title: Youth Spring Showcase Usher
volunteer_opportunities.description: Support families arriving for the Youth Spring Showcase by greeting, scanning tickets, and guiding guests to seating.

volunteer_opportunities.title: Family Sing-Along Front-of-House
volunteer_opportunities.description: Help set up the lobby, welcome families, and assist with seating at the Family Community Sing.

volunteer_opportunities.title: Holiday Concert Usher
volunteer_opportunities.description: Serve as an usher for our December Holiday Concert, helping with doors, programs, and late seating.

volunteer_opportunities.title: Family Carol Sing Usher
volunteer_opportunities.description: Greet families, direct them to will-call, and assist with general admission seating for the Family Carol Sing.

volunteer_opportunities.title: Tour Send-Off Concert Front-of-House
volunteer_opportunities.description: Assist with ticket scanning, ushering, and post-concert reception setup for the Touring Ensemble send-off.

volunteer_opportunities.title: Adult Workshop Greeter & Check-In
volunteer_opportunities.description: Welcome participants to the Adult Community Singing Workshop, manage check-in, and distribute handouts.

volunteer_opportunities.title: Office Volunteer  Data Entry
volunteer_opportunities.description: Assist staff with entering audition and scholarship information into our database.

volunteer_opportunities.title: Scholarship Application Administrative Support
volunteer_opportunities.description: Help organize and file scholarship applications and prepare reviewer packets.

volunteer_opportunities.title: Spring Choir Festival Usher
volunteer_opportunities.description: Provide usher and crowd-flow support for our multi-choir spring festival.

volunteer_opportunities.title: Donor Reception Front-of-House
volunteer_opportunities.description: Support the Donor Appreciation Reception with check-in, name tags, and light hospitality tasks.

volunteer_opportunities.title: Songs in the Park Usher
volunteer_opportunities.description: Assist with welcoming guests, directing them to the lawn, and answering basic event questions.
